caption: A man with blonde hair wearing a dark blue t-shirt and gaming headphones is seen in a small inset window, appearing to be in a room with a Christmas tree and a computer monitor in the background. The surrounding screen displays a gaming interface against a dark purple background. In the top half of the video, the word "SUBSTITUTION" is visible in the upper left corner, while the bottom half shows "LINEUP" in the same position. Along the top and middle of the screen, numerical data and status indicators are displayed, including "173,037," "0," "14,600," "2,343,543," and "LVL 19 (90)." Below the "LINEUP" text is a menu bar with options for "OFFENSE," "DEFENSE," "SPECIAL TEAMS," "SPECIALISTS," "STRATEGY," and "VISUALS." Throughout the frames, the man remains in a similar position with a neutral expression, and the on-screen text and interface elements remain static.
